gc_controller_deployment.note: Deployment accepted, ReplicaSet created, toleration patch applied, taint removed, but controller-manager CrashLoopBackOff prevents pod scheduling and runtime verification on this VM

known_issues: Control-plane instability: kubelet cycles controller-manager and scheduler through CrashLoopBackOff every 1-5 minutes even after nuclear reset and correct sandbox_image. Root cause suspected to be kubelet/pause-container reconcile loop on kernel 6.12.74+deb13+1-amd64 with containerd 1.7.24.
GC controller pods cannot run on this VM due to controller-manager/scheduler instability. Runtime reconciliation not verified on v1.36 kubeadm.
kube-proxy in CrashLoopBackOff (known flannel/kube-proxy interaction on v1.36 kubeadm).
v1.36 kind and k3d PASS results (see kind.md, k3d.md) demonstrate runtime behavior on stable clusters.
limitations: Only tested on single-node control-plane with flannel CNI
Runtime controller reconciliation not verified on this VM (CBCBO preventing scheduling)
CRD acceptance, CRUD, negative schema, RBAC, and idempotent install verified against K8s v1.36.2 API server
